summary: Added per-lane Gate Radar filters, signal classification, generated sigil artwork, Asset Vault registration, and responsive layout hardening.

pattern_notes: Risk heat maps and matrices make blocker pressure easier to prioritize when they separate higher-impact items from watch-list items.
Filter chips help dense dashboards narrow to the class of risk that needs attention without changing the underlying data.
Game UI radar/sigil language can add atmosphere while still exposing actionable blocker text and next actions.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium sci-fi blocker radar sigil sheet with six abstract circular gate glyphs for blocker, review, account, browser, payment, and public-action states; no text, labels, logos, or watermark.

data_contract: Gate radar filters are browser-local per-lane preferences under agent-company-atlas.gate-radar-filter.v1.
gateRadarCategory(item) classifies existing gate/service-request/promotion text into blocker, review, browser, account, payment, or public without adding snapshot schema.
renderGateRadar(lane) filters radar pings and cards while keeping pressure stats derived from the full signal set.
The generated sigil sheet is used in Gate Radar cards and registered as a system asset in the Visual Asset Vault.
ui_notes: Filter chips render only for categories present in the selected lane's radar items.
Gate cards show cropped sigils from the generated sheet so categories read visually before the user reads text.
Stats now auto-fit with a minimum width to avoid clipped labels in constrained wide layouts.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel true, filters [], sigils 0, activeFilter null, no console errors.

green.result: ok true; filters [all, blocker, browser]; sigils 1; generated board asset loaded; blocker filter persisted to localStorage; no clipped text, page overflow, console errors, or failed requests.

responsive: phone 390: ok true; filters 3; sigils 1; statColumns 2; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
tablet 820: ok true; filters 3; sigils 1; statColumns 2; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
desktop 1280: ok true; filters 3; sigils 1; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
wide 1600: ok true; filters 3; sigils 1; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors after stat auto-fit fix.

asset_vault.result: ok true; Gate Radar sigil sheet card found; image complete; naturalWidth 1254; Asset Vault count 43 assets; no console errors or failed requests.

static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, and web/README.md

next_actions: Add realm-specific radar skins that swap sigil palettes or scope motifs by lane pack.
Add an optional Gate Radar notes field in browser-local drafts so operators can annotate blocker triage without mutating snapshot data.
Extend the generated sigil approach into per-lane animated blocker badges for the Arcade Deck and Path Map.
